expectations.text: Response contains required substrings (set_group_by_shank, SortGroup.SortGroupElectrode, SpikeSortingRecording).
Response does not contain forbidden substring `set_group_by_electrode_group is fine`.
expectations.evidence: Forbidden substring absent. Response actively warns against using v0 set_group_by_electrode_group pattern.

expectations.text: Identifies set_group_by_electrode_group as the wrong grouper for clusterless pipelines
expectations.evidence: 'There is no set_group_by_electrode_group on v1 SortGroup ... even on v0 it groups by electrode_group_name, which on a polymer probe collapses all shanks of the probe into one group — i.e. it would have produced exactly the same multi-shank-group footgun. Don't port that v0 pattern into v1 clusterless work.'

expectations.text: Recommends set_group_by_shank with the exact method name
Shows SortGroup.SortGroupElectrode inspection to verify one-shank-per-group
expectations.evidence: Verify section: `(SortGroup.SortGroupElectrode & key).fetch(format='frame')` joined to Electrode.probe_shank with nunique check per sort_group_id.

expectations.text: Does not frame this as a SpikeInterface bug
expectations.evidence: 'SpikeInterface is correct to reject, and there's no bug in the v1 grouper'.
